title: BAMS Jobs 2026 – Consultant
shortInfo: The Regional Ayurveda Research Institute (RARI) Ranikhet has released an official walk-in recruitment notification for 1 Consultant post for experienced Ayurveda professionals holding a B.A.M.S. degree with five years of working experience. Eligible candidates can attend the walk-in interview scheduled on 05 June 2026 and participate in the selection process through document verification and interview

basic_details.short_information: The Regional Ayurveda Research Institute (RARI) Ranikhet has released an official walk-in recruitment notification for 1 Consultant post for experienced Ayurveda professionals holding a B.A.M.S. degree with five years of working experience. Eligible candidates can attend the walk-in interview scheduled on 05 June 2026 and participate in the selection process through document verification and interview

age_limit.details: Candidates who are interested in applying for the RARI Ranikhet Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form.

qualification.education_qualification: B.A.M.S. from any recognised University with five years working experience
qualification.details: Consultant (Ayurveda): B.A.M.S. from any recognised University with five years working experience. Desirable: Experience extending Clinical care services, Publications.

faq.question: What is the post name for the RARI Ranikhet recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the RARI Ranikhet recruitment is Consultant (Ayurveda).

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for the Consultant (Ayurveda) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Consultant (Ayurveda) post.

faq.question: What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in.

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 05-06-2026.

faq.question: What is the required qualification for the Consultant (Ayurveda) post?
faq.answer: The required qualification is B.A.M.S. from any recognised University with five years of working experience.

faq.question: What is the maximum age limit for this post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this post is 64 years.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Consultant (Ayurveda) position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 50,000 per month.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category.

faq.question: What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Walk-in Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Where is the RARI Ranikhet located?
faq.answer: RARI Ranikhet is located in Ranikhet, Uttarakhand, with the pincode 263645.
